disambiguated.context: At the bar, two different people approached a man sitting alone at the bar - one of them was Khalid Shakir and the other Alan Li. Khalid Shakir passed by him and ordered a drink from the bartender while Alan Li told the man their typical rate for spending the night together.
disambiguated.question: Who was just going up to the bartender?
